page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Program that aligns rna-seq reads to a genome in order to identify exon-exon splice junctions. it is built on the ultrafast short read mapping program bowtie. a stable samtools version is now packaged with the program.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Program that aligns RNA-Seq reads to a genome in order to identify exon-exon splice junctions. It is built on the ultrafast short read mapping program Bowtie. A stable SAMtools version is now packaged with the program.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Program that aligns RNA-Seq reads to a genome in order to identify exon-exon splice junctions. It is built on the ultrafast short read mapping program Bowtie. A stable SAMtools version is now packaged with the program.
